behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names script path scripts/update-example-deps.mjs, Done output, changeset:version script, packages/ and examples/ directories, caret format, and both dependency types - all test assertions map to these.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to do but not the specific implementation (globSync, Object.fromEntries, etc.).

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for substrings like 'packages', 'version', '^', 'dependencies', 'devDependencies' which any reasonable implementation would contain; don't assert specific variable names or exact output format.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the script via subprocess.run with node, check return codes and stdout, run eslint/prettier, not just text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub script that just contains the words 'packages', 'version', 'dependencies', 'devDependencies', '^' as comments/strings and prints 'Done' would pass all f2p tests - e.g., test_script_reads_workspace_packages only greps content, test_script_updates_example_dependencies returns early if no example uses the package and otherwise only checks returncode==0.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover script existence, execution, Done output, changeset:version integration, caret format, both dep types.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings indicating fail_to_pass vs pass_to_pass.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies package.json files but follows existing npm schema; no new structured output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands appear consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the obvious files/locations relevant to a new feature without naming specific buggy lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch only modifies one line in package.json's changeset:version script, localized change.
